'''âd-v-j''' ('''kadavaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulpify|pulpify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulpify|pulpify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadavaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavaj|thidavaj]] || [[word:jidavaj|jidavaj]] || [[word:shidavaj|shidavaj]] || [[word:kidavaj|kidavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavaj|thuthudavaj]] || [[word:jujudavaj|jujudavaj]] || [[word:shushudavaj|shushudavaj]] || [[word:kukudavaj|kukudavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavaj|thudavaj]] || [[word:judavaj|judavaj]] || [[word:shudavaj|shudavaj]] || [[word:kudavaj|kudavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudavaj|thudavaj]] || [[word:judavaj|judavaj]] || [[word:shudavaj|shudavaj]] || [[word:kudavaj|kudavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedavaj|thedavaj]] || [[word:jedavaj|jedavaj]] || [[word:shedavaj|shedavaj]] || [[word:kedavaj|kedavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodavaj|thothodavaj]] || [[word:jojodavaj|jojodavaj]] || [[word:shoshodavaj|shoshodavaj]] || [[word:kokodavaj|kokodavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodavaj|thodavaj]] || [[word:jodavaj|jodavaj]] || [[word:shodavaj|shodavaj]] || [[word:kodavaj|kodavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodavaj|thodavaj]] || [[word:jodavaj|jodavaj]] || [[word:shodavaj|shodavaj]] || [[word:kodavaj|kodavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdavaj|thĂŠdavaj]] || [[word:jĂŠdavaj|jĂŠdavaj]] || [[word:shĂŠdavaj|shĂŠdavaj]] || [[word:kĂŠdavaj|kĂŠdavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadavaj|thathadavaj]] || [[word:jajadavaj|jajadavaj]] || [[word:shashadavaj|shashadavaj]] || [[word:kakadavaj|kakadavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadavaj|thadavaj]] || [[word:jadavaj|jadavaj]] || [[word:shadavaj|shadavaj]] || [[word:kadavaj|kadavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadavaj|thadavaj]] || [[word:jadavaj|jadavaj]] || [[word:shadavaj|shadavaj]] || [[word:kadavaj|kadavaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadavaj|shadavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadavaj|goshadavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadavaj|gokishadavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadavajnĂŒ|shadavajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadavajnknĂŒ|goshadavajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavajnĂŒ|gokishadavajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadavajshĂ«|shadavajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadavajnkshĂ«|goshadavajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadavajshĂ«|gokishadavajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavajro|shadavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavajnkro|goshadavajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavajro|gokishadavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavajmu|shadavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavajnkmu|goshadavajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavajmu|gokishadavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadavajsher|shadavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadavajnksher|goshadavajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadavajsher|gokishadavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadavajng|shadavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadavajnkng|goshadavajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadavajng|gokishadavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadavajya|shadavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadavajnkya|goshadavajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadavajya|gokishadavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadavajyam|shadavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadavajnkyam|goshadavajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadavajyam|gokishadavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavajnĂŒshĂ«|shadavajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadavajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadavajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavajnĂŒro|shadavajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavajnknĂŒro|goshadavajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavajnĂŒro|gokishadavajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavajnĂŒmu|shadavajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavajnknĂŒmu|goshadavajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavajnĂŒmu|gokishadavajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavajshĂ«nĂŒ|shadavajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadavajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadavajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavajshĂ«ro|shadavajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavajnkshĂ«ro|goshadavajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavajshĂ«ro|gokishadavajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavajshĂ«mu|shadavajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavajnkshĂ«mu|goshadavajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavajshĂ«mu|gokishadavajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavajronĂŒ|shadavajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavajnkronĂŒ|goshadavajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavajronĂŒ|gokishadavajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavajroshĂ«|shadavajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavajnkroshĂ«|goshadavajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavajroshĂ«|gokishadavajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavajromu|shadavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavajnkromu|goshadavajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavajromu|gokishadavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavajmunĂŒ|shadavajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavajnkmunĂŒ|goshadavajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavajmunĂŒ|gokishadavajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavajmushĂ«|shadavajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavajnkmushĂ«|goshadavajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavajmushĂ«|gokishadavajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavajmuro|shadavajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavajnkmuro|goshadavajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavajmuro|gokishadavajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
